description: Lower fragment: Letter from Shelomo b. Eliyyahu to Rabbenu David ha-Ḥakham. Dealing mainly with business matters and also raising money for the capitation tax. Mentions many people including: Ṭāhir al-Simsār; Hiba al-Bilbaysī; Abū l-Makārim al-Kohen. Regards to al-Sadīd and to Abū l-Thanā' and his wife. Shelomo has been suffering an attack of ophthalmia and only wrote this letter with great effort.
tags: ramad, Illness, illness: eye, illness: ramad, Shelomo b. Eliyyahu, illness letter 969-1517
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
